task: STRICT P0 FRONTEND FIX — Ruby Gemstone count + timer false reset + mobile text cutoff

problem1_ruby_gemstone.root_cause: The previous fix matched fish whose MUTATION name was a 'Ruby' alias. The real Fish It payload is the opposite shape: a fish CARD named 'Ruby' (baseFishName/cleanName 'Ruby', card mutation null) whose per-instance mutation is 'Gemstone'. So the top card never matched and stayed 0.
problem1_ruby_gemstone.fix: Added normalizeToken + RUBY_FISH_NAME_ALIASES({'ruby'}) + GEMSTONE_MUTATION_ALIASES({'gemstone','gem stone','ruby gemstone'}) + isRubyGemstoneFishInstance(row) which requires name=Ruby AND mutation=Gemstone. rubyGemstoneCountForItem expands ownedInstances (merging card+instance fields) and counts each matching instance; falls back to the row amount, then to the legacy standalone 'Ruby Gemstone' item detector. getRubyGemstoneTopCardCount sums per-card counts over getPublicFishItems/Stone/Totem — the same getters the detail/list view uses.
tests: aggregated Ruby Gemstone row amount:3 -> 3 (string amount works)
top card does not stay 0 among other fish
legacy standalone 'Ruby Gemstone' item still counts
detail view + top card share getPublicFishItems source
value flows from computed stat (not hardcoded)

problem2_timer_false_reset.root_cause: Every renderable poll (and every status poll carrying leaderstats) called markEntry*Refreshed unconditionally, so the visible timer reset on each poll even when the displayed numbers did not change — producing the 1s..~10s loop.
problem2_timer_false_reset.fix: Introduced an effective displayed-dataset signature. stableStringify + buildLeaderstatsSignature (displayed coins/totalCaught/rarest) + buildInventorySignature (fish/stone/totem rows + Ruby Gemstone count) + buildDisplayedDatasetSignature (username + leaderstats + inventory). maybeResetSectionTimers(entry) runs AFTER the preserved-inventory merge + live-snapshot sync and only marks a section refreshed when that section's signature changed. Wired into applyInventoryPollPayload and applyAccountStatusPayload; removed the unconditional pre-merge marks.

behavior.status_only_payload: leaderstats reset, inventory keeps counting (preserved inventory => identical inventory signature)

problem2c_first_load_resume.fix: pollUser now tags each request via entry._pollReqSeq and aborts applying a response when a newer request started (isStaleResponse checked after fetch resolves AND after reading the body), so a slow stale response can never overwrite newer state. Tab visibilitychange / window focus / pageshow now trigger refreshTrackerNow with a 700ms leading-edge debounce (one immediate fresh fetch, no burst). pageshow is no longer gated on ev.persisted. Page load already fetches immediately on add + requestAnimationFrame(pollAccountStatuses(true)).

problem3_mobile_cutoff.root_cause: .accounts-mobile-card__username forced overflow:hidden + text-overflow:ellipsis + white-space:nowrap on a fixed font, and the stats grid coin/value cells could clip on 320-390px phones.
problem3_mobile_cutoff.fix: Username now wraps up to 2 lines (clamp font, overflow-wrap:anywhere, -webkit-line-clamp:2) with a title tooltip exposing the full name. Coin/Caught/Rare values use min-width:0, overflow-wrap:anywhere, white-space:normal, text-overflow:clip and clamp() fonts. @media(max-width:420px) scales fonts; @media(max-width:340px) collapses the stats grid to 2 columns with Rare spanning full width.

tests_result: new + updated suites pass: tracker_p0_signature_timer_resume_mobile_2026_06_16 (all), tracker_sections_ruby_mutation_2026_06_16 (all), tracker_frontend_refresh_timer_2026_06_16 (11/11). Pre-existing unrelated backend-grace failures in fishit_three_separate_indicators (5 pass / 3 fail) confirmed identical on clean baseline.
